mapper.insert: INSERT INTO JOIN_BATTLE ( BATTLE_ID, USER_ID, WIN_STATUS, TEAM ) VALUES ( #{battleId}, #{userId}, #{winStatus}, #{team} )
mapper.select: SELECT BATTLE_ID, USER_ID, WIN_STATUS, TEAM FROM JOIN_BATTLE WHERE BATTLE_ID = #{battleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT BATTLE_ID, USER_ID, WIN_STATUS, TEAM FROM JOIN_BATTLE WHERE BATTLE_ID = #{battleId} ORDER BY USER_ID

SELECT JB.BATTLE_ID AS BATTLE_ID, JB.USER_ID AS USER_ID, JB.WIN_STATUS AS WIN_STATUS, JB.TEAM AS TEAM, U.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, W.WORKRECORD_DATE AS FINISH_TIME FROM JOIN_BATTLE JB JOIN USERS U ON JB.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN WORKRECORD W ON W.BATTLE_ID = JB.BATTLE_ID AND W.USER_ID = JB.USER_ID WHERE JB.BATTLE_ID = #{battleId} ORDER BY JB.WIN_STATUS, W.WORKRECORD_DATE, U.NICKNAME
